system_framing: Hydraulic pressure and flow telemetry monitoring

action_recommendations.description: Continue standard hydraulic flow and routine mechanical monitoring.
Elevate telemetry polling rates. Prepare contingency bypass protocols and stage spare pump components.
Implement mandatory municipal water restrictions. Divert non-critical industrial flow to stabilize grid pressure.
Evidence warrants immediate controlled depressurization. Issue system-wide boil water advisories and alert emergency services of total fire flow loss.

scoring_description: Assessment of water network pressure stability, mechanical redundancy, and catastrophic failure risk.
